title: Phase 3 personal-model feature vector
missing_value_strategy: SimpleImputer(strategy='mean') — fills NaN with training-set mean. NO 'feature was missing' indicator companion features.

features.name: sharpness_score
features.semantics: Phase 1 tile-p90 multi-measure fusion (Laplacian + Tenengrad + Modified-Laplacian). 100 = tack sharp.

features.name: exposure_score
features.semantics: Phase 1 histogram-based exposure score. Penalises mean deviation from 128 + clipping > 10% + low contrast.

features.name: overall_score
features.semantics: sharpness*w + exposure*(1-w), w=0.65 default. WARNING: this is also the additive base for personal_score — known double-counting risk.

features.name: iqa_score
features.semantics: TOPIQ no-reference perceptual IQA. 0 raw → clamped → x100.

features.name: aesthetic_score
features.semantics: LAION Aesthetic Predictor V2 linearMSE on CLIP-L/14 (L2-normed) embedding. 1-10 raw → (raw-1)/9*100.

features.name: highlight_clip_pct
features.semantics: % of preview pixels at value 255 (any channel). Computed live from the preview, not RAW.

features.name: shake_detected
features.semantics: Boolean fused from EXIF rule (shutter vs. safe threshold) and pixel rule (gradient direction consistency + FFT elongation).

features.name: face_detected
features.semantics: True if FaceLandmarker OR BlazeFace fallback found a face.

features.name: face_count
features.semantics: Total faces detected. Aggregation policy across faces is 'worst case' (e.g., eyes_open=False if any face has closed eyes).

features.name: face_sharpness_score
features.semantics: Laplacian variance on the face crop ONLY (not the whole image). NULL when face_detected=0. NaN imputed with population mean — known correctness risk.

features.name: eyes_open
features.semantics: True iff blendshape mean(left+right blink) <= 0.4. From FaceLandmarker only — BlazeFace fallback returns NULL.

features.name: eye_openness_ratio
features.semantics: 1 - mean(left_blink, right_blink). 1.0 = fully open, 0.0 = fully closed. NULL with no face data.

features.name: face_size_ratio
features.semantics: Face bbox area / image area. Bigger = more portrait-like framing.

features.name: focal_length_mm
features.semantics: EXIF focal length. Lens-dependent. Often missing on RAFs without complete EXIF parsing.

features.name: aperture
features.semantics: EXIF f-number. Lower = wider aperture, shallower DoF.

features.name: iso
features.semantics: EXIF ISO speed. Higher → more noise → harder to score sharpness honestly.

feature_correlation_warnings: feature[2] (overall_score) is a deterministic linear combination of feature[0] and feature[1] with known weights. Including all three may cause GBR to over-weight the sharpness/exposure axis.
feature[2] is ALSO the additive base for personal_score — double-counted.
feature[8] (face_detected) and feature[9] (face_count) are highly correlated (face_count >= 1 ↔ face_detected = 1).
feature[8], feature[10], feature[11], feature[12], feature[13] are jointly NULL when face_detected=0. Imputation strategy invents 'eyes mostly open' values for no-face rows.
